overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded assassin exploring an ancient Egyptian temple complex at dusk. The character moves through a ceremonial courtyard with sphinx statues and burning offerings, then proceeds along curved stone pathways toward a large hieroglyphic-covered gate, with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial temple courtyard with sphinx statues and offerings

events.description: character turns left to navigate around the large sphinx statue
exits the covered ceremonial area into the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the ceremonial courtyard, observing the sphinx statues and ritual offerings

notable_agents.action: kneeling in prayer before the sphinx statue
robed figure kneeling near the incense burner

entered.detail: stone structure with draped white fabric and flowering vines overhead
large dark stone sphinx with rounded headdress
scattered bowls of fruit and ceremonial items on the ground
tall stone column carved with Egyptian hieroglyphics
smoking brazier emitting white incense smoke

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a semi-covered ceremonial courtyard at dusk, passing large sphinx statues and kneeling worshippers. Incense smoke rises from braziers among scattered fruit offerings, while fabric canopies and hieroglyphic pillars frame the sacred space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with curved walkways and irrigation channels

events.description: character transitions from walking to jogging pace
character turns right to follow the curved pathway

agents.ego_description: jogging through the open courtyard along curved stone pathways lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: two figures walking together toward the character
solitary robed figure walking along the distant path

entered.detail: tall palm trees scattered throughout the courtyard
light-colored stone walkway with dark drainage channels
rocky mountain range visible against the blue hour sky
long dark water channels running parallel to the path
high stone enclosure walls with decorative tops

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open courtyard, the character jogs along curved stone pathways with irrigation channels on either side. Palm trees sway in the breeze while distant mountains loom against the darkening sky, and a few robed figures walk along the perimeter paths.

scene_state.functional_zone: processional way leading to large temple gate with hieroglyphics

events.description: ground surface changes from smooth tiles to rough cobblestones as approaching the gate
character slows to walking pace while approaching the massive gate structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the imposing stone gate, observing the detailed hieroglyphic carvings on the walls

entered.detail: massive rectangular gate structure with tall pylons covered in hieroglyphics
stone walls carved with colorful Egyptian figures and symbols
rough-hewn stone pathway leading directly to the gate entrance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a straight cobblestone processional way flanked by hieroglyphic-covered walls, approaching a massive stone gate. Palm trees line the avenue in formal rows as the imposing temple entrance looms larger, its carved reliefs depicting ancient Egyptian figures in vivid colors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, incense-filled confines of a ceremonial courtyard into a wide, open temple plaza at dusk. It begins within a semi-covered sacred space, gliding past large sphinx statues and kneeling worshippers while incense smoke drifts from braziers among scattered fruit offerings. As the character moves forward, the framing of fabric canopies and hieroglyphic pillars gives way to the open air. The scene then expands as the character jogs along curved stone pathways flanked by irrigation channels, with palm trees swaying in the breeze. Finally, the perspective opens fully to reveal robed figures walking the perimeter under a darkening sky, with distant mountains looming on the horizon.

The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a ceremonial avenue that leads toward a monumental temple entrance. It begins with the character proceeding down a straight cobblestone processional way, flanked by formal rows of palm trees. As the camera advances, the view is framed by towering walls covered in intricate hieroglyphics that guide the path forward. The scene then culminates as the camera approaches a massive stone gate, where the imposing entrance looms larger and reveals vivid, carved reliefs of ancient Egyptian figures.
